title: TopicResearchDecision
description: Output of aep/prompts/trend-research-agent.md — the real judgment pass over the deterministic shortlist, required before writing starts.

topic_confirmed.description: true if the pipeline's proposed topic was confirmed as worth writing; false if rejected/overridden.

final_topic.description: The topic actually being written about after this review — may differ from the pipeline's proposal for a standalone article, but must equal the fixed series title for a series-continuation.

rationale.description: Concrete reasoning: what was checked, what was found, why this topic (or rejection) is the right call.

sources_checked.description: Real URLs actually read during this review, not just those already in research-bundle.json.

alternative_considered.description: If the shortlist's top-ranked candidate was passed over in favor of another, name it here.
